segments.speaker: 题目23/24
segments.text: Listen to an announcement at a school art exhibit. Thank you for touring this special collection of paintings we recently acquired from a donor. We're going to begin with late 18​th century works in the hallway on your left. We'll then proceed to early 19 th century in the next room and finish with the modern art collection on the next floor. But 1​st, I'll pass out a detailed map of the collection, which includes some artist information on the back.
